topic: Phase 4 Batch D Cumulative Diff Review
dominant_theme: Schema 先行, runtime 落后 — 7 commits 把 API/schema/docs 全放好, 但没连成循环
unanimous_4of4: decision_audit 'always on' but not wired into reflect/wiki (Opus/Sonnet/Codex/Gemini)

sonnet: SignalKind TS union missing correction_candidate (shared with Codex)
graph-health TS null vs 0011 NOT NULL
gemini: Self-Consumption guard documented but not implemented
opus: No src/ import of any new cognitive module (all islands)
codex: graph-health TS returns null/throws vs 0011 real view

key_insight: No runtime crash despite throwing stubs — because no src/ caller imports them. Contract-reality gap is the real risk, not crashes.
meta_lesson: per-commit audit (debate 004) missed cross-commit contract drift. Run cumulative audit every 3-5 commits.
